allowed_fixes: implementation defects that do not change SMA, exposure, costs, periods or gates
development_gate: positive base compounded total and each of 2021/2022/2023; 30-day circular-block bootstrap lower daily mean > 0; lower max drawdown than continuous 0.5x long; max episode adverse > -50% capital
holdout_release_rule: Fetch 2024-2025 only after development passes; fetch 2026H1 only after fixed evaluation; never modify the rule after release
known_exposure: No SOLUSDT price, funding, spot, perpetual or result data was used by earlier research before this checkpoint
positions: Use prior UTC close versus its SMA200; next UTC day +0.5 long above, else -0.5 short
question: Can a fixed SOLUSDT daily SMA200 0.5x long/short rule remain profitable through development, independent evaluation and later confirmation after actual funding proxy, turnover costs and intraday adverse checks?
study_code_revision_reason: Data-integrity-only revision: preserve checksum-verified monthly archives, backfill only absent daily timestamps from the official public USD-M Kline REST endpoint, bind the backfill hash into the manifest, normalize timestamps, and make data-quality PASS mandatory before holdout authorization. Economic rules, periods, costs and gates are unchanged.
